Hero.tagline: Building elegant solutions to complex problems
Hero.specializing: Specializing in React, Node.js, and cloud architecture.

About.title: I build software that solves real problems and delights users.
About.bio: Passionate full-stack engineer with 2+ years of experience crafting high-performance applications. I specialize in React, Node.js, and cloud architecture. I love turning ideas into reality and I am always eager to learn new technologies.

items.title: Front-End Developer
description: Development and maintenance of administrative dashboards and internal portals for managing proposals, contracts, and documents in the health sector.
Implementation of responsive and scalable interfaces using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, improving performance and user experience.
Collaboration in agile squads with product, design, and back-end teams to deliver new features and ensure efficient API integration.
Active contribution to code quality through best practices, refactoring, and architectural consistency.

items.title: External Relations Director and Front-End Manager
items.company: TITAN - UFBA Computer Engineering Junior Enterprise
description: Front-end leadership in web project development, including institutional websites and event landing pages.
Team leadership and project coordination, acting as President and External Relations Director.
Institutional representation with partners, university departments, and in the Junior Enterprise Movement.
